evaluation.summary: Overflow in the log‑P term for primorial bases occurs at order k=132, and a guarded log‑gamma routine successfully avoids overflow for all orders up to this limit.
next_directions: Extend the analysis to higher primorial orders to locate the exact overflow boundary beyond k=132.
Validate the guarded log‑gamma approach across multiple LDAB correction factor formulations and base sets.
Perform statistical analysis of the correction factor values to assess convergence and error bounds.
